title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Dalmia Bharat
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!
